Class FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.circuitbreaker.retry.FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.cloud.client.circuitbreaker.ConfigBuilder<FrameworkRetryConfig>
public class FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder extends Object implements org.springframework.cloud.client.circuitbreaker.ConfigBuilder<FrameworkRetryConfig>
Builder for FrameworkRetryConfig. Configuration follows the Spring Retry CircuitBreakerRetryPolicy model with openTimeout and resetTimeout.
Author:
Ryan Baxter

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder(String id)
    Create a new builder for the given circuit breaker id.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FrameworkRetryConfig
    build()
     
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    openTimeout(Duration openTimeout)
    Set the open timeout - how long the circuit stays open before transitioning to half-open.
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    resetTimeout(Duration resetTimeout)
    Set the reset timeout - how long to wait after a failure before resetting the circuit breaker state.
    FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder
    retryPolicy(org.springframework.core.retry.RetryPolicy retryPolicy)
    Set the underlying retry policy to use when the circuit is closed.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder

      public FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder(String id)
      Create a new builder for the given circuit breaker id.
      Parameters:
      id - the circuit breaker identifier

  • Method Details

    • retryPolicy

      public FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder retryPolicy(org.springframework.core.retry.RetryPolicy retryPolicy)
      Set the underlying retry policy to use when the circuit is closed. By default, uses RetryPolicy.withDefaults() which provides 3 retry attempts with a 1 second delay.
      Parameters:
      retryPolicy - the retry policy
      Returns:
      this builder

    • openTimeout

      public FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder openTimeout(Duration openTimeout)
      Set the open timeout - how long the circuit stays open before transitioning to half-open. Default is 20 seconds.
      Parameters:
      openTimeout - the open timeout duration
      Returns:
      this builder

    • resetTimeout

      public FrameworkRetryConfigBuilder resetTimeout(Duration resetTimeout)
      Set the reset timeout - how long to wait after a failure before resetting the circuit breaker state. If no failures occur within this timeout, the circuit breaker resets. Default is 5 seconds.
      Parameters:
      resetTimeout - the reset timeout duration
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public FrameworkRetryConfig build()
      Specified by:
      build in interface org.springframework.cloud.client.circuitbreaker.ConfigBuilder<FrameworkRetryConfig>
